items.title: VBS 2026: Junkyard Redemption
items.text: This summer's Vacation Bible School theme was Junkyard Redemption — a week of Bible truth, crafts, and fun for kids across the Plateau.

items.title: Merry Christmas to Our Teachers
items.text: The church thanked the teachers and staff at South Fentress Elementary with Christmas appreciation.

items.title: Adult Christmas Party
items.text: A night of fun and fellowship — featuring Ms. Ann, the reigning Queen of Christmas, coming to steal everyone's gift in the exchange!

items.title: VBS 2025: What a Mess
items.text: Vacation Bible School returned with the What a Mess theme, complete with online registration for the first time.

items.title: Youth Bowling Outing
items.text: CBC Youth had a blast on their bowling outing — with thanks to Cody and Anna Grace Hull for their leadership and mentorship of our young people.

items.title: Church Christmas Party
items.text: Lots of fun, food, and gifts as the church family celebrated the season together.

items.title: Youth Group Christmas Celebration
items.text: Youth leaders Cody and Anna Grace Hull hosted the youth in their home for movie night and fun.

items.title: Operation Christmas Child
items.text: Shoeboxes came in for National Collection Week — gifts and the Gospel sent to children around the world.

items.title: Thanksgiving Week Midweek Service
items.text: Midweek service moved to Tuesday for Thanksgiving week so church families could travel and gather.

items.title: New Women's Bible Study
items.text: A new Women's Bible Study kicked off — turning hearts toward the birth of the Savior as the Christmas season approached.

items.title: Homecoming 2024
items.text: Homecoming Service at 10:00 AM — a great day of worship, memories, and dinner on the grounds.

items.title: VBS 2024
items.text: School's out… now what? VBS! A full week of Vacation Bible School for all ages.

items.title: Spring Revival
items.text: Four nights of revival services at 6:00 PM, closing with finger foods and desserts before the final service.

items.title: Baptism Sunday
items.text: A wonderful day as new believers followed the Lord in baptism in the church's new baptistry.

items.title: Good Friday & Easter
items.text: Good Friday evening service at 6:00 PM and Easter morning worship at 11:00 AM celebrating the risen Savior.

items.title: Teacher Appreciation Dinner
items.text: The church served a spaghetti dinner for teachers at South Fentress during parent–teacher conferences — a huge meal and a bigger thank-you.

items.title: Looking Ahead: 2024
items.text: Opportunities to serve all year: the Easter program with Burlinda Wright, VBS with Larry Pritchett, and summer mission trips for youth and adults with the Hulls.
